functions.name: saveFcmToken
functions.description: Save user's FCM token for push notifications

functions.name: sendPushNotification
functions.description: Send push notification to a specific user

functions.name: notifyAllDonors
functions.description: Broadcast blood request notification to all eligible donors

functions.name: sendAdminNotification
functions.description: Send admin announcement to all users

functions.name: checkNotificationStatus
functions.description: Check if user has notifications enabled

functions.name: notifyDonorsOnNewRequest
functions.description: Auto-trigger notifications when a new blood request is created

functions.name: notifyOnPrivateMessage
functions.description: Auto-trigger notifications when a new private message is sent

functions.name: cleanupExpiredTokens
functions.description: Clean up expired or invalid FCM tokens daily
